Generate 100% unit tests for all code files located in the specified /tests folder.

Rules:

Write complete and functional tests without omitting any scenarios.

Do not use comments like # add more tests or # test other cases later.

If the folder or files are organized by modules, generate separate test files for each module.

Cover all possible code paths, including success cases, errors, exceptions, and invalid inputs.

Use the project's native testing framework (e.g., unittest, pytest, Jest, etc.).

Maintain code style consistency with the rest of the project.

If there are external dependencies or required mocks, configure them correctly.

Write everything so that the code can be run directly without manual modifications.

Do not finish the response until all tests are completed and no file/function is left without coverage
